properties.displayName: Check Point Cyberint Premium IOC Connector

connectorUiConfig.title: Check Point Cyberint Premium IOC Connector
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Cyberint, a Check Point company, provides a Microsoft Sentinel integration to ingest Premium Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) from the Infinity External Risk Management solution into Microsoft Sentinel. This connector incrementally pulls the premium IOC feed — including malicious IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes — enriched with confidence, severity, malicious classification, kill chain stage, blocking and uniqueness flags, malware types, and CVE/campaign associations.

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Check Point Cyberint API Key, Argos URL, and Customer Name
customs.description: The connector API key, Argos URL, and Customer Name are required

instructionSteps.title: Connect Check Point Cyberint Premium IOC Feed to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
To enable the connector provide the required information below and click on Connect.

**Argos URL** — Cyberint API URL for your tenant (e.g. `https://your_tenant.cyberint.io`)

**API Token** — Cyberint API access token

**Customer Name** — Company (client) name associated with your Cyberint instance
>

parameters.label: Customer Name
parameters.placeholder: Company (client) name associated with your Cyberint instance
parameters.name: customername

metadata.description: Name of the Logic App / Playbook
Base URL of the Check Point Exposure Management API (e.g. https://your-company.cyberint.io)
API token for Check Point Exposure Management

inputs.name: EnrichmentComment
inputs.value: IP: @{items('For_each_IP')?['Address']} — Malicious: @{json(string(body('Enrich_IP')))?['malicious']} | Confidence: @{json(string(body('Enrich_IP')))?['confidence']} | Severity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_IP')))?['severity']} | Activity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_IP')))?['activity']} | Kill Chain: @{json(string(body('Enrich_IP')))?['kill_chain_stage']} | Malware Family: @{json(string(body('Enrich_IP')))?['malware_family']} | First Seen: @{json(string(body('Enrich_IP')))?['first_seen']}

inputs.name: EnrichmentComment
inputs.value: Hash (@{outputs('Select_hash_type')}): @{items('For_each_FileHash')?['Value']} — Malicious: @{json(string(body('Enrich_FileHash')))?['malicious']} | Confidence: @{json(string(body('Enrich_FileHash')))?['confidence']} | Severity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_FileHash')))?['severity']} | Activity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_FileHash')))?['activity']} | Malware Family: @{json(string(body('Enrich_FileHash')))?['malware_family']} | Threat Actors: @{join(coalesce(json(string(body('Enrich_FileHash')))?['threat_actors'], json('[]')), ', ')} | CVEs: @{join(coalesce(json(string(body('Enrich_FileHash')))?['cves'], json('[]')), ', ')}

inputs.name: EnrichmentComment
inputs.value: Domain: @{items('For_each_Domain')?['DomainName']} — Malicious: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['malicious']} | Confidence: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['confidence']} | Severity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['severity']} | Activity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['activity']} | Malware Family: @{json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['malware_family']} | Threat Actors: @{join(coalesce(json(string(body('Enrich_Domain')))?['threat_actors'], json('[]')), ', ')}

inputs.name: EnrichmentComment
inputs.value: URL: @{items('For_each_URL')?['Url']} — Malicious: @{json(string(body('Enrich_URL')))?['malicious']} | Confidence: @{json(string(body('Enrich_URL')))?['confidence']} | Severity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_URL')))?['severity']} | Activity: @{json(string(body('Enrich_URL')))?['activity']} | Kill Chain: @{json(string(body('Enrich_URL')))?['kill_chain_stage']} | Malware Family: @{json(string(body('Enrich_URL')))?['malware_family']}

metadata.title: Check Point Exposure Management - Premium IOC Enrichment and Triage
metadata.description: When a new Microsoft Sentinel incident is created, this playbook enriches IOC entities (IPs, domains, file hashes, URLs) using the Check Point Exposure Management Premium IOC enrichment API and adds a structured enrichment comment to the incident. The Premium API returns malicious classification, confidence (0-100), severity (0-5), kill-chain stage, malware family, threat actors, CVEs, and type-specific enrichment.
prerequisites: 1. A valid Check Point Exposure Management API token and base Argos URL (e.g. https://your-company.cyberint.io).
2. The Logic App Managed Identity must be granted Microsoft Sentinel Responder role on the resource group.
postDeployment: 1. Grant the Logic App Managed Identity the **Microsoft Sentinel Responder** role.
2. Configure an automation rule in Microsoft Sentinel to trigger this playbook on incident creation.

releaseNotes.title: Check Point Exposure Management - Premium IOC Enrichment and Triage

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

Cyberint, a Check Point company, provides Microsoft Sentinel integration to streamline premium IOC ingestion and bring enriched threat intelligence from the Infinity External Risk Management solution into Microsoft Sentinel. The Premium IOC connector incrementally pulls high-fidelity indicators — IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes — enriched with confidence, severity, malicious classification, kill-chain stage, blocking and uniqueness flags, malware types, and CVE/campaign associations.

Data Connectors: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
